basics.name: Royce Redfearn Jr.
basics.label: Senior Web Architect & Technical Project Lead

fullstack.title: Senior Full-Stack Architect & Technical Lead
fullstack.headline: Solutions Architect & Technical Lead | Bridging Legacy Systems with Modern Performance | 20+ Years Engineering High-Velocity Enterprise Platforms
fullstack.summary: Senior Full-Stack Architect & Technical Lead with 15+ years of experience driving enterprise-scale digital transformations and legacy-to-modern migrations. Expert in bridging robust backend infrastructure (PHP, ASP.NET, Node.js) with highly optimized modern frontends (Vue.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS). Proven track record of accelerating Agile team velocity, optimizing Core Web Vitals, and engineering programmatic SEO architectures that drastically reduce paid acquisition costs. Committed to clean code (SOLID principles), CI/CD automation, and delivering scalable web applications at high velocity.
fullstack.metaDescription: 15+ year veteran of web architecture, specializing in high-performance legacy-to-modern migrations. Bridging robust backend infrastructure with optimized modern frontends.

frontend.title: Senior Front-End Architect & UI Engineer
frontend.headline: Senior Frontend Architect & UI Engineer | Crafting Sub-Second, Accessible Interfaces | Expert in Atomic Design, Fluid Typography & Modern Web Performance
frontend.summary: Senior Front-End Architect and UI/UX Engineer specializing in crafting high-performance, accessible (WCAG), and scalable user interfaces. Expert in modern JavaScript frameworks (Vue.js, React), utility-first CSS (Tailwind), and Atomic Design methodologies. Proven track record of spearheading enterprise framework adoption, engineering fluid typography engines, and optimizing Core Web Vitals. Master of modern build tools (Vite, Webpack) and headless WordPress (ACF-JSON, Timber/Twig) integrations, transforming complex state management into seamless, mobile-first user experiences.
frontend.metaDescription: Specialist in crafting high-performance, accessible, and scalable user interfaces using modern build tools, utility-first CSS, and complex state management.

backend.title: Senior Back-End Engineer & Infrastructure Specialist
backend.headline: Senior Systems Architect & Infrastructure Lead | Engineering Secure API Ecosystems & Scalable Data Pipelines | Hardening Enterprise Stacks for Maximum Uptime
backend.summary: Senior Back-End Engineer and Infrastructure Architect focused on designing secure, scalable data systems and server environments. Deep expertise in Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), PHP 8.4+, C# / ASP.NET, and complex MySQL/MariaDB optimization. Specialized in developing robust RESTful APIs and microservices for medical (HIPAA-compliant environments), government, and enterprise sectors. Highly proficient in cloud architecture (AWS, Azure), Docker containerization, Nginx load balancing, and rigorous server hardening against modern web vulnerabilities.
backend.metaDescription: Backend architect focused on secure, scalable data systems, server infrastructure, OOP PHP, and REST API development for enterprise sectors.

pm.title: Technical Project Lead & Agile Manager
pm.headline: Technical Project Lead & Agile Mentor | Accelerating Team Velocity & SDLC Efficiency | Specializing in Ground-Up Platform Consolidations & Strategic Execution
pm.summary: Technical Project Lead and Interim Scrum Master acting as a 'player-coach' to stabilize operations, remove blockers, and dramatically accelerate team velocity. Leveraging 15+ years of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) experience, I translate complex business requirements into actionable technical scopes. Expert in Agile methodologies, Kanban/Gantt tracking, and cross-functional leadership. Proven ability to establish enterprise coding standards, manage stakeholder expectations, and drive the successful, on-time delivery of both rapid-deployment sites and complex enterprise platforms.
pm.metaDescription: Player-coach developer translating complex business requirements into actionable technical execution using Agile methodologies to ensure on-time delivery.

seo.title: Technical SEO & Growth Architecture Specialist
seo.headline: Technical SEO & Growth Architect | Engineering Organic Traffic Engines | Optimizing Core Web Vitals to Reverse Paid Acquisition Reliance
seo.summary: Technical SEO Specialist and Growth Engineer focused on bridging the gap between advanced web architecture and aggressive organic traffic scaling. Expert in Core Web Vitals optimization, programmatic SEO, and granular user journey tracking (GTM, GA4). I engineer automated asset optimization pipelines (WebP, S3) and complex Schema.org (JSON-LD) architectures to drastically improve search engine rankings and Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO). Proven history of reversing paid acquisition reliance by executing high-ROI, data-driven organic growth strategies.
seo.metaDescription: Technical growth engineer specializing in Core Web Vitals, organic traffic scaling, automated asset pipelines, and complex Schema architectures.

accomplishments.text: Acted as Interim Scrum Master and Technical Lead for a 6-person engineering pod, successfully transitioning the department from rigid processes to high-velocity Agile workflows.
Spearheaded the rapid architecture and deployment of multiple high-traffic broadcast and event properties, including Southwest Believers Convention, America Stands, and Victory News.
Spearheaded the enterprise-wide transition to a scalable, atomic Vue.js architecture, isolating UI patterns into reusable components to drastically improve code maintainability and team velocity.
Engineered a version-controlled ACF-JSON workflow and automated IDE configurations (.cursorrules) to streamline developer experience (DX) and environment portability.
Automated complex content migrations using specialized PHP handlers and custom sanitization functions to ensure data integrity across thousands of legacy posts.
Developed a custom SCSS fluid typography engine using dynamic clamp() calculations and modern logical properties for seamless, accessible scaling across viewports.

Engineered automated asset delivery pipelines using SVG symbol libraries and strict S3 versioning rules, optimizing Core Web Vitals and ensuring performant high-DPI rendering across high-traffic broadcast properties.
Orchestrated unified GTM tracking envelopes and comprehensive product/revenue funnels, establishing baseline SEO and conversion metrics across multiple high-traffic broadcast properties.

accomplishments.text: Architected a programmatic SEO strategy and reverse-proxy architecture (Webflow to ASP.NET) for the clinician-capture platform, shifting user acquisition from 90% paid to 85%+ organic and generating an industry-recognized growth case study.

Engineered dynamic decision-engine interfaces and clinician-capture funnels utilizing Scriban HTML templating within an ASP.NET environment, directly consuming a .NET 7 API layer to seamlessly process thousands of recruiter leads.
Supported high-availability enterprise infrastructure by maintaining CI/CD deployment pipelines via Azure DevOps, Docker, and Git, ensuring near-perfect uptime for mission-critical applications.

accomplishments.text: Drove office-wide adoption of Asana and established cross-functional Agile workflows, aligning developer, marketing, and engineering stakeholders around unified delivery cadences for a complex network of municipal websites.
Engineered highly secure, HIPAA/Gov-compliant REST APIs and geospatial MySQL databases serving over 30,000 mapping data points.

Architected a high-performance GIS mapping UI and custom CMS, utilizing advanced Google Maps clustering logic to render 30,000+ data points and reducing map load times from 8 seconds to sub-second latency.
Integrated Shopify for PCI DSS compliance, processing secure database updates via webhooks after successful transactions.
Orchestrated data-driven email marketing and SEO architectures centered around municipal events, scaling the subscriber base by 700% and doubling average campaign Click-Through Rates (CTR).

Maintained and hardened high-availability LAMP stack environments utilizing Docker, Nginx load balancing, and strict XSS/CSRF protections, achieving 99.5% average uptime for critical municipal infrastructure.

accomplishments.text: Providing full-stack architecture, AWS/Linux infrastructure management, and digital strategy for high-profile SMBs including TexasTitle.com, MaverickNational.com, Levarte Travel, and WheresGeorge.com.
Freelance theme integration for Where's George (https://www.wheresgeorge.com/) — wired branding and layout into a custom PHP template with a fully responsive front end across viewports.
Consulted with clients to define project goals, scope, and timelines, managing end-to-end delivery of responsive eCommerce websites and custom billing systems.
Produced and deployed multimedia marketing assets, including video advertisements broadcasted on NBC5 Television and regional movie theaters.

accomplishments.text: Developed custom WordPress Multisite (WPMU) 'Brand Tool Boxes' acting as sales and support platforms for 10+ major global brands (Adidas, Burberry, Diesel).
Architected a custom API and web application to deliver SKU-based watch movement instructions, supporting a global network of 3,000+ users.

Contracted through Amplifi Commerce as UI/UX Developer on the Nintendo 3DS launch program—translating campaign creative into screen flows, layout specs, and production-ready interface assets for retail and digital touchpoints.
Partnered with agency art directors and developers to deliver consistent, on-brand UI patterns across the 3DS campaign while meeting Nintendo brand guidelines and tight launch deadlines.

recommendations.name: Jason Wendel
recommendations.title: Lead Software Engineer / Principal Media Consultant, Fossil Inc. / Flying Donut Media
recommendations.text: Royce is an elite WordPress engineer who possesses a rare balance of deep backend architectural capability and advanced frontend styling discipline. At Fossil, his execution of the parent-child multi-tenant system was a masterclass in clean, dry code inheritance across complex corporate brand environments.

recommendations.name: Chris Sumpter
recommendations.title: Senior Web & Graphic Specialist, Quick Technologies Inc. (SAGE)
recommendations.text: Working closely alongside Royce in high-intensity agency frames revealed his foundational strength in structural engineering. He consistently decoupled complex templating debt and managed deep networking layers, such as corporate DNS routing tables, with absolute precision.

recommendations.name: Dustin Bird
recommendations.title: Director of Search Engine Optimization, Spider Websites
recommendations.text: Royce approaches search optimization purely from an engineering standpoint. Instead of relying on superficial plugins, he builds performance metrics, rigid structural semantic hierarchies, and complex custom metadata schemes directly down into the root layer of the application codebase.

recommendations.name: Robert Agee
recommendations.title: Principal UI Designer & Visual Partner, TRYRDESIGN
recommendations.text: Royce is the definitive answer for any design team needing high-level engineering execution. He treats complex visual mockups as literal technical blueprints, translating design systems into responsive, pixel-perfect layout files with immaculate cross-browser performance markers.

recommendations.name: Kim Lay
recommendations.title: Managing Director, KL Creations
recommendations.text: The custom platform overhaul and search accessibility architectures Royce engineered completely transformed our digital pipeline. His technical optimization strategy produced a dramatic spike in organic acquisition channels that scaled our operation beyond our baseline projections.

recommendations.name: James Connell
recommendations.title: Founder & Principal Architect, Web Video 360
recommendations.text: Royce took charge of our programmatic solution specifications, establishing highly accurate project delivery milestones and building an integrated digital system that perfectly balanced enterprise stability with fluid customer conversions.

recommendations.name: Christina Jackson
recommendations.title: SAS Contracts Officer, Raytheon Company
recommendations.text: Royce's engineering discipline ensures strict adherence to functional parameters and data lifecycle security. He communicates complex architectural decisions elegantly, making him an outstanding engineering partner for high-compliance environments.

recommendations.name: Steve Waterman
recommendations.title: Managing Partner & Infrastructure Lead, Central Computer & Networks
recommendations.text: Royce brings deep system comprehension to every project. From optimizing raw database query behavior to tracking web transactions via localized API microservices, his solutions are built to preserve uptime and resist external web exploits.

recommendations.name: Kevin Bowden
recommendations.title: Executive Director, Quest Records
recommendations.text: Royce engineered a seamless, multi-channel corporate presence for our organization from scratch. His ability to build customized software backends while maintaining precise design constraints across the visual presentation tier is exceptional.

recommendations.name: Miguel Flores
recommendations.title: Systems Support Lead, Quick Technologies Inc. (SAGE)
recommendations.text: Royce's code architectures are built for optimal deployment and maintainability. Having supported production environments he established, I can verify that his structural hygiene, clean documentation, and platform error-handling drastically reduce systems maintenance cycles.

recommendations.name: Ashlee Attebery
recommendations.title: Information Architect & Content Lead, Quick Technologies Inc. (SAGE)
recommendations.text: Royce treats application data with strict relational discipline. His architectures seamlessly separate the presentation envelope from backend storage nodes, enabling clean data manipulation loops and empowering editing teams to update complex schemas with zero runtime degradation.
